minimum_observation: island_id plus guide/spot metric on common scale
claim_unlocked_when_present: tests whether guide loss follows pollinator hierarchy rather than climate-only pattern
blocked_claim_when_absent: guide loss cause cannot be assigned

minimum_observation: island_id plus flower length or mouth diameter
claim_unlocked_when_present: tests Bombus diversus to B. ardens to non-Bombus size matching
blocked_claim_when_absent: full stage ordering remains partly inferred

claim_unlocked_when_present: tests reproductive assurance axis after Bombus loss
blocked_claim_when_absent: selfing syndrome cannot be separated from visitor turnover

minimum_observation: island_id plus outcrossing estimate or interval
blocked_claim_when_absent: SC cannot be translated into realized selfing

minimum_observation: selfed vs outcrossed survival or fitness after seed set
claim_unlocked_when_present: tests whether selfing has near-term assurance but later cost
blocked_claim_when_absent: near-term SC cannot support inbreeding-depression claim

minimum_observation: island_id plus visitor guild frequency per observation effort
claim_unlocked_when_present: tests whether hierarchy is availability/frequency not just presence
blocked_claim_when_absent: visitor presence cannot become interaction strength

minimum_observation: island_id or locality plus occurrence/absence or search effort
claim_unlocked_when_present: tests E-stage distribution/reachability against F-stage reproduction
blocked_claim_when_absent: trait matching cannot be linked to distributional establishment
